prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the disciplinary actions of an insolvency practitioner under the Insolvency Practitioners Association in relation to a complaint about professional conduct. It does not apply to Scotland, as different laws and regulatory bodies govern insolvency practitioners in Scotland.
